title: Kimura® Pro Heavy Duty Garden Shears - Premium Hedge Shears with Patented Gearing Technology, Ultra Lightweight Aluminium Handles, Japanese SK5 Steel Blades, Ideal Shears for Gardening - 560mm
features: [ERGONOMIC DESIGN] - The lightweight aluminium handles feature soft TPR grips for enhanced comfort, control and safety. The even distribution of weight between the garden shear blades and handles makes it easy for anyone to hold these garden shears.
[SHARP & PRECISE] - The Japanese SK5 steel blades ensure precision cutting and long-lasting edge rentention. Ideal for both shaping and clearing hedges and shrubs with minimal effort.
[LOW FRICTION] - PTFE coating help the shears glide through plants without sap build-up or rusting, allowing for a smooth cut every time.
[EASY TO USE] - Patented gearing technology gives you up to 3x more power whilst reducing strain on hands and arms when gardening.
[MADE TO LAST] - Tough steel construction with anti-rust components and riveted handles guarantee a durable product that is sure to stand the test of time.
[VERSATILE] – The hedge shear blades are also wavy which assist with cutting larger stems up to 25mm in diameter.

[LIFETIME WARRANTY] - We are so confident in the quality of our hedge shears that a lifetime warranty is included in your purchase. If for any reason you are unsatisfied with your purchase, simply contact us and we will make it right.
